text.title: Stakeholder Analysis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Run full method: register + power/interest + RACI.
Run lite version: register only, skip RACI.

example.trace: count=12 → context=cross-functional → full method; 12 stakeholders, 6 artefacts in RACI.
